news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on April 18, 2025, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume, published an extensive social sentiment analysis report in partnership with Santiment, a crypto market intelligence platform. This report provides valuable insights into two important aspects of the crypto market.
news.headline: Bybit x Santiment report analyzes OM Collapse and XPR EFT, revealing insights. Bybit is 2nd largest exchange.

news.summary: Singapore-based company LUX has launched a new campaign that transforms hitting the Like Button into a bold power move. The initiative aims to redefine social media engagement by emphasizing the impact of simple interactions. This campaign by LUX has garnered attention globally, with a significant increase in social media engagement rates by over 30% since its launch. The company's innovative approach has resonated with users, leading to a surge in brand awareness and positive feedback.
news.headline: LUX campaign in Singapore turns liking into a power move, breaking traditional norms.

news.summary: First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), based in Santa Ana, California, has launched VeriTitle™, an innovative solution to speed up the mortgage and home equity loan origination process. This tool provides essential title information to lenders at the start of loan applications. By offering crucial title intelligence, VeriTitle™ aims to streamline and facilitate the lending process for borrowers and lenders alike. This development signifies a significant step towards efficiency in the industry.
news.headline: First American Data & Analytics launches VeriTitle to speed up mortgage process with crucial title intelligence.

news.summary: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (KREF) has announced a change in the timing of its first quarter 2025 earnings conference call and webcast. Originally scheduled for Thursday, April 24, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET, it will now take place at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Those interested can access the conference call by dialing (844) 784-1730 for U.S. callers or +1 (412) 380-7410 for non-U.S. callers, with a provided passcode.
news.headline: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. changes Q1 2025 call time to 9:00 a.m. ET on April 24; Dial (844) 784-1730 or +1 (412) 380-7410.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that there has been a significant increase in cyber attacks during the first half of this year. The number of cyber attacks has surged by 25%, reaching a total of over 4.5 million incidents globally. This increase is alarming and highlights the growing threat of cybercrime. The report also indicates that the financial sector was the most targeted industry, with over 60% of the attacks aimed at financial institutions. This emphasizes the need for organizations to enhance their cybersecurity measures to protect against these evolving threats. Experts recommend implementing robust security protocols and providing regular training to employees to mitigate the risk of cyber attacks.
news.headline: Chinese Premier urges increased support for stock and property markets.
US offers to ease sanctions on Russia in Ukraine peace plan.

news.summary: A recent report has shown a significant decrease in global carbon emissions by 6.4% in 2020, mainly due to the COVID-19 pandemic. This was the largest decrease on record, with emissions falling by over 2.3 billion metric tons compared to the previous year. The lockdown measures implemented by various countries led to a drop in transportation and industrial activities, resulting in this substantial reduction. However, experts warn that this reduction is only temporary and urge for long-term sustainable solutions to combat climate change. The report also highlighted that some regions, such as Asia, experienced a more modest decline compared to others. The data serves as a crucial reminder of the relationship between human activities and environmental impact.
news.headline: Trump praises Meloni but offers sparse details.

news.summary: The Flint Hills Series by Noble Grazing presents ranchers with an opportunity to adopt sustainable and profitable land management techniques at a lower expense. The program, established by Noble Research Institute in 1945, serves as a valued source of knowledge for farmers and ranchers. Noble Grazing aims to provide cost-effective solutions to enhance land management practices for the agricultural community.
news.headline: Noble Research Institute, Kansas State Univ, Hy-Plains Feedyard preserve Tallgrass Prairie with region-specific rancher education, reducing costs.

news.summary: Just in time for summer, EcoFlow has launched two new products - WAVE 3 and GLACIER Classic. These portable devices provide all the necessary tools to relax comfortably at the beach, campsite, or barbecue. The WAVE 3 offers portable air cooling capabilities, while the GLACIER Classic ensures convenient power supply. The release took place in Seattle on April 18, 2025, showcasing EcoFlow's commitment to providing eco-friendly energy solutions. Get ready to enjoy the summer with these innovative products designed to enhance outdoor experiences.
news.headline: EcoFlow introduces WAVE 3 and GLACIER Classic portable air conditioners for outdoor use. Aiming to provide comfort during summer with EcoFlow's eco-friendly energy solutions.

news.summary: San Diego-based Qualcomm Incorporated (NASDAQ: QCOM) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.89 per common share, scheduled to be paid out on June 26, 2025. This dividend will be for stockholders of record as of June 5, 2025. Qualcomm is known for its innovative approach in providing intelligent computing solutions globally, contributing to addressing significant societal challenges. With a history of 40 years in technology leadership, Qualcomm continues to introduce groundbreaking advancements aimed at a diverse portfolio of innovations.
news.headline: Qualcomm (NASDAQ: QCOM) declares $0.89 quarterly dividend per share, payable on June 26, 2025, to stockholders on record by June 5, 2025.

news.summary: Recently, there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the country. The total number of confirmed cases has surpassed 200,000, with over 5,000 new cases reported in the last 24 hours. This surge in cases has put immense pressure on the healthcare system, with hospitals reaching maximum capacity. Health officials are urging the public to follow safety protocols such as wearing masks, practicing social distancing, and getting vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to control the outbreak and protect public health.

news.summary: On April 18, 2025, in Staten Island, ES Bancshares, Inc. announced its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company, which includes Empire State Bank, reported a net income of $546,000, translating to $0.08 per diluted common share. This marks an increase from the previous quarter ended December 31, 2024, where the net income was $466,000, or $0.07 per diluted common share.
news.headline: ES Bancshares, Inc. reports Q1 2025 net income of $546k, up from $466k in Q4 2024. Positive trend in net interest margin.

news.summary: ASUS has recently unveiled the enhanced TUF Gaming A14 laptop, blending an ultra-portable form factor with exceptional AI-driven capabilities. The new model features upgraded hardware offering cutting-edge performance, making it a standout choice for gamers and tech enthusiasts alike. This latest iteration boasts improved processing power and graphics performance, ensuring seamless gameplay and efficient multitasking. With its enhanced AI capabilities, the TUF Gaming A14 delivers a superior gaming experience while maintaining a compact and lightweight design, appealing to users who prioritize both performance and portability.
news.headline: ASUS unveils upgraded TUF Gaming A14 for ultimate performance; combines ultraportable design with AI enhancements.

news.summary: The previously approved cap on fees, which was supposed to take effect last year, has not been implemented yet. However, some banks have taken the initiative to lower or completely remove their charges. To minimize your expenses, consider the following suggestions.
news.headline: Potential end to $5 overdraft fee limit. Despite approval last year, many banks never enforced it. Some tips to cut costs.

news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, as of April 18, 2025, recent progress in drone technology is revolutionizing the methods through which preservationists assess, renovate, and protect cultural sites. Drones enable the capture of detailed architectural images and offer essential information for the restoration process. These advancements are enhancing efforts to preserve historical landmarks across the globe.
news.headline: Drones revolutionize historical preservation in Europe with advanced technology capturing architectural details, aiding restoration.

news.summary: A student has been granted a $100,000 fellowship by O'Shaughnessy Ventures LLC (OSV) in Greenwich, Conn. The investment firm is known for supporting creators and has awarded the fellowship to Aida Baradari. This funding will be used for the development of pocket-sized anti-recording devices. The fellowship was announced on April 18, 2025, marking a significant achievement for Aida Baradari and highlighting the innovative work being done in this field.
news.headline: OSV backs pocket-sized privacy tech with $100K fellowship to Aida Baradari, founder, for developing anti-recording devices.
Effective Fed Funds rate 4.33% April 17th vs 4.33% April 16th.

news.summary: As gold prices reach new highs, Bitcoin investors are looking for exposure to the precious metal, facing challenges like buying physical gold's quality, liquidity, and premiums. Bitcoin is easier to buy than physical gold due to its availability, no need for vaults, and instant transactions. Physical gold buyers deal with additional costs, limited liquidity, and widened spreads. Traditional finance investors are less enthusiastic about Bitcoin's self-custody, citing difficulties in storing private keys and accessing coins securely. While physical gold is easier to buy, Bitcoin and tokenized gold offer transparency and liquidity. Gold advocates believe gold will always hold historical value, but Bitcoin is building financial infrastructure for the future. Spot gold price stands at $3,327, up 27% YTD, while Bitcoin price is at $84,525, down 10% YTD. The article emphasizes the advantages and challenges of buying physical gold versus Bitcoin in terms of ease, liquidity, and ownership complexities.
news.headline: Investors debate: Easier to buy Bitcoin or gold? Gold prices soar as buyers face hurdles. Bitcoin faster to acquire. Gold advocates cite ease of purchase; others see challenges in self-custody. Gold stands at $3,327, up 27% YTD; Bitcoin at $84,525, down 10% YTD.

news.summary: A recently unveiled service provides construction General Contractors (GCs) with quick and convenient access to a specialized capital pool. This initiative, known as QuickPay, is the result of a partnership between ProNovos, a construction intelligence platform, and Viva Capital. This innovative solution aims to revolutionize the way contractors obtain funding for their projects. The launch of QuickPay signifies a strategic move to offer GCs a streamlined process for accessing capital promptly.
news.headline: ProNovos and Viva Capital team up to launch QuickPay, providing construction GCs with quick access to capital.

news.summary: In April 2025, a moving short film called "When the Shelves Hymn" created as part of Film AlUla's AlUla Creates program is scheduled to be shown in the official competition at the 11th Saudi Film Festival, happening from April 17 to 23, 2025. This film will also be considered for the Oscars qualification.
news.headline: AlUla Creates film "When the Shelves Hymn" starring Mana Almajd to debut at Saudi Film Fest & Oscar-qualifying events.

Taking place in Los Angeles on April 18, 2025, the newest installment of the YouTube show and podcast series Books That Changed My Life delves into the personal and enlightening journey of the individual.Listeners can gain insight into the significant events and factors that influenced her career, allowing a deeper understanding of the numbers behind her success.

This significant development comes shortly after the recent introduction of iQIYI's...
news.headline: iQIYI to build second theme park, iQIYI LAND, in Kaifeng with technology and IP focus. Milestone after last month's unveiling.

news.summary: Two new doctors, Dr. Dan Rasor in Southwest Austin and Dr. Naimeh Tashakkorinia in North Austin, are now accepting new patients. This development occurred on April 18, 2025, in Austin, Texas and Boca Raton, Florida. MDVIP, a prominent membership-based healthcare provider, has widened its primary care network across the nation with these recent additions.
news.headline: MDVIP opens 2 new primary care practices in Austin, Texas. Drs. Dan Rasor in Southwest Austin and Naimeh Tashakkorinia in North Austin welcome new patients. (Words: 65)

news.summary: Today, Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM) based in Chicago revealed the establishment of its Tempus Advisory Board. This board, consisting of medical professionals, aims to uphold high standards and ensure that the company's strategy and services are backed by expert knowledge from external sources. The Advisory Board's role is essential in guiding Tempus to advance precision medicine and elevate patient care through AI technology solutions.
news.headline: Tempus (NASDAQ: TEM) introduces Advisory Board with leading US physicians to advance precision medicine.

news.summary: Schrödinger, Inc. disclosed today that they have awarded a non-statutory stock option for the purchase of 3,300 company common stock shares to a recently recruited employee. Additionally, the company granted restricted stock units (RSUs) covering 12,866 common stock shares to six newly hired employees on April 16, 2025. These allocations were issued in accordance with Schrödinger's 2021 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan and were sanctioned by the compensation committee.
news.headline: Schrödinger granted stock options for 3,300 shares & RSUs for 12,866 shares to newly hired employees under Nasdaq listing rule.

news.summary: The article discusses the rising interest in gold among Bitcoin investors, emphasizing the challenges associated with purchasing physical gold in terms of quality, liquidity, and premiums above spot prices. While gold advocates view gold as easier to buy than Bitcoin due to complexities in storing private keys, industry executives highlight additional costs and challenges involved in buying and selling physical gold. Traditional finance investors are wary of Bitcoin self-custody, which requires securely storing private keys to access coins. The CEO of a gold-focused marketplace questions the convenience of Bitcoin self-custody due to these challenges. The price of spot gold is $3,327, up 27% YTD, while Bitcoin, at $84,525, is down 10% YTD. The article contrasts the ease of buying physical gold with the transparency and liquidity offered by digital assets like Bitcoin and tokenized gold, highlighting the unique value propositions of each.
news.headline: Comparison between Bitcoin and gold for investors: Bitcoin offers easier, faster accessibility compared to gold. While gold faces challenges like maintaining quality and selling liquidity, Bitcoin eliminates the need for vaults, storage costs, and resale challenges. Some critics cite difficulties in self-custody for Bitcoin due to storing private keys, in contrast to the simplicity of buying physical gold. Gold advocates emphasize the ease of purchasing gold coins or jewelry, but digital assets like Bitcoin provide transparency, liquidity, and verifiability. Bitcoin and gold are seen as complementary assets - gold holding historical value while Bitcoin builds future financial infrastructure. Current spot gold price is $3,327 (+27% YTD), while Bitcoin is trading at $84,525 (-10% YTD). Financial professionals discuss the shift in crypto sentiments from financial nihilism to a big vision for the future.

news.summary: Cutting-edge technology designed to enhance skeletal strength will soon be introduced to the Lakeside region of Omaha. OsteoStrong, a renowned global provider of skeletal health solutions, recently finalized the sale of a new franchise in this area. The implementation of this technology aims to revolutionize bone health in the community. The new franchise sale signifies an important step in promoting physical well-being in Omaha, as OsteoStrong continues to expand its reach across the globe.
news.headline: OsteoStrong sells franchise in Lakeside Omaha, Nebraska, bringing skeletal strength tech to the area.

news.summary: Located in Auburn Hills, Michigan, Auburn Hills Dental, a prominent dental care provider, revealed on April 18, 2025, that they have become part of the network for various significant insurance companies. This includes MetLife, Aetna, and BlueCross BlueShield, offering their services to a wider client base.
news.headline: Auburn Hills Dental in MI, expands insurance coverage by becoming in-network with MetLife, Aetna, BlueCross BlueShield.

news.summary: Celebrating 15 years of expertise and a strong partnership with QVC, Patricia Nash Designs held a special event in Kennett Square, Pa., on April 18, 2025. The memorable afternoon featured fashion, florals, and stories, showcasing the brand's craftsmanship. Visit https://patricianashdesigns.com/ for more details on this milestone occasion.
news.headline: Patricia Nash Designs marks 15th anniversary at event with QVC, honoring craftsmanship.

news.summary: In January 2025, mental health conditions were the reason for almost 60% of patients making telehealth claims across the country. A new report now provides insights into the percentage of patients opting for telehealth services, the different procedure categories covered, and the comparison between urban and rural areas in terms of telehealth usage. These details were highlighted in the recent release on April 18, 2025, in New York.
news.headline: FAIR Health's Monthly Telehealth Regional Tracker reveals mental health conditions made up nearly 60% of patients in January 2025. New features include patient percentages, procedure categories, and urban vs. rural usage.

news.summary: In RIEHEN, Switzerland on April 18, 2025, Ymmunobio AG (YB), a Swiss biotech firm focusing on cancer therapeutics, has confirmed the successful completion of its two-antibody drug conjugate (ADC) assets, namely YB-800ADC1 and YB-800ADC2.
news.headline: YB-800 ADCs by Ymmunobio AG reach milestone in cancer therapeutics development. (Characters: 80)

news.summary: On April 18, 2025, Prospect Capital Corporation disclosed the outcomes of its recent cash tender offer to acquire all outstanding notes. The company made this offer in line with the Offer to Purchase dated April 9, 2025, which detailed the conditions of the Tender Offer along with the Notice of Guaranteed Delivery. Investors were invited to sell their notes back to the company through this offer. This initiative aimed to streamline the company's financial structure and optimize its operations. Further details about the number of notes tendered and additional relevant figures were not provided in the news release.
news.headline: Prospect Capital Corp reveals results of cash tender offer for all 3.706% Notes due 2026; Offer to Purchase dated April 9, 2025.

news.summary: Netflix's stock is anticipated to surge as it reaches the threshold of breaking out from a double-bottom base on Monday, potentially propelled by after-hours gains subsequent to its impressive Q1 report. This development comes amidst positive market speculation, signaling a promising upward trajectory for the company.
news.headline: Netflix stock likely to break out after earnings beat, double-bottom base; strong after-hours gains.

news.summary: The upcoming Tesla earnings report is highly anticipated, particularly in regards to their self-driving technology deadlines. The stock price of TSLA is currently close to its lowest point since 2025. On the other hand, BYD is expected to show further growth in earnings. A comparison between Tesla and BYD highlights the significance of Tesla's impending earnings announcement and the competition in the fast-charging market segment.
news.headline: Tesla earnings due, stock near 2025 lows, focus on self-driving deadlines. BYD earnings likely accelerated.

news.summary: In Washington, Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni of Italy was showered with praise by President Trump as he accepted her invitation to visit Rome.
news.headline: Trump lauds Italian PM Meloni in Oval Office meet; accepts invite to Rome. Special rapport solidified.

news.summary: Tineco, a prominent player in smart home appliances, has launched its second pop-up store in Milan to showcase its latest products, including the Tineco FLOOR ONE S9 Artist series. The store, located at Via Nerino 2 near the Milan Cathedral, will be open from April 18 to 24 between 10:00 and 20:00. This event coincides with Pet Week in Milan. news.summary: In Southern California, the national championship of Honda's Campus All-Star Challenge featured 32 top teams from Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs). The competition offered a $100,000 institutional grant from Honda, with Tennessee State University, Morehouse College, and Tuskegee University securing the top four positions. This challenge serves as a prestigious platform for HBCUs and showcases their academic prowess.
news.headline: Hampton University wins 2025 Honda Campus All-Star Challenge with $100,000 grant; top teams from 32 HBCUs competed. Tennessee State University, Morehouse College, and Tuskegee University place in top four.

news.summary: This week, the stablecoin of the Synthetix protocol experienced a significant drop to a historical low, continuing its trend of depegging over the past month.
news.headline: sUSD stablecoin hits record low at $0.66 as depegging continues, marking a month-long trend.

news.summary: A conference, the 9th Annual Modern Intranets for Employee Communications, has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Participants will have the opportunity to access live tours and actual intranet screenshots from various organizations. The event aims to provide insights on enhancing intranet platforms and comparing internal communication approaches to improve employee satisfaction, foster collaborative workplace cultures, and align with strategic organizational objectives.
news.headline: "The 9th Annual Modern Intranets for Employee Communications Conference in New York, May 20-22, 2025. Enhance intranets and internal communications to boost employee experience and organization goals."
